description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 6, 2026 at 6:58 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV on S. Figueroa Street at W. 23rd Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was stopped facing northeast on S. Figueroa Street in the third from the right lane for a red light at the intersection with W. 
23rd Street. When the light turned green, the Waymo AV proceeded a short distance and then slowed down before entering the intersection 
to yield to an active emergency vehicle traveling northeastbound on S. Figueroa Street against the proper direction of traffic with its 
emergency lights activated. While the Waymo AV was stopped, an SUV that was initially stopped directly behind the Waymo AV 
proceeded forward, and the front of the SUV made contact with the rear of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the 
Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
